sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenClaw / NemoClaw / Hermes Agents

bullets.body: **Hermes Agent v0.11.0 "Interface" (Apr 23) — adoption Apr 26-28; Ink-based React TUI, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth, 1,556 commits / 761 PRs / 224K insertions / 29 contributors** — Patuloy ang pinakamalaking Hermes Agent release hanggang ngayon. Pluggable transport architecture sa ilalim ng bawat provider; 5 bagong inference paths; 17th messaging platform (QQBot); shell hooks (pre/post tool call, on_session_start); webhook direct-delivery zero-LLM mode; configurable subagent orchestrator na may file-coordination layer.

citations.label: GitHub - NousResearch/hermes-agent v0.11.0 RELEASE notes

bullets.body: **OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta — patuloy ang sub-24h cadence hanggang Apr 28** — Voice-stack hardening, browser-automation safe-tab URLs, CDP-native role-snapshot fallback, CLI image-gen `--background` option, Discord voice channel `channels.discord.voice.model` override, plugin-onboarding install-record preservation. Ang cadence mismo ang istorya; walang bagong minor by Apr 28.

citations.label: OpenClaw - Latest Features & Release Notes

bullets.body: **Multica v0.2.16 (Apr 24) — Chat V2 dedicated sidebar + main-area page, right-click context menus sa mga issue na may unified actions sa list/board/detail, in-app feedback flow, redesigned Autopilot modal; v0.2.8 (Apr 20) nagdagdag ng Kimi CLI bilang runtime sa ACP + per-agent `model` field na may provider-aware dropdown** — Open-source vendor-neutral managed-agents orchestrator na nagiging assignable teammates ang Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw / OpenCode / Hermes / Gemini / Pi / Cursor Agent: i-assign mo ang issue, kukunin ng agent ang trabaho, magsusulat ng code, mag-uulat ng blockers, at autonomous na mag-uupdate ng status. Self-hosted; nasa parehong orchestration layer ng AgentCore Managed Harness at Claude Managed Agents.

citations.label: GitHub - multica-ai/multica releases

sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenAI / Microsoft / Anthropic — Apr 27 partnership re-architecture

bullets.body: **Pinatay ang OpenAI–Microsoft AGI clause noong Apr 27 — non-exclusive license hanggang 2032, capped ang revenue share sa 2030, AWS $38B nakapirma na (Nov 2025)** — Hindi na nawawala ang Microsoft commercial IP rights sa OpenAI dahil sa OpenAI-board AGI declaration; tatapos na ngayon ang revenue share sa kalendaryo (2030); intact ang stake ng Microsoft (~$135B / ~27% as-converted). Legally na malinis na ang OpenAI para magpadala ng buong product line nito sa AWS, Oracle, Google.

**Simon Willison Apr 27: "Tracking the history of the now-deceased OpenAI Microsoft AGI clause"** — Ang canonical practitioner-history primer kung paano ang clause ay structured at kung ano ang specifically inalis ng Apr 27 amendment.

citations.label: Simon Willison - Tracking the history of the now-deceased OpenAI Microsoft AGI clause

bullets.body: **AWS Weekly Roundup Apr 27 — Anthropic + Meta partnerships, Lambda S3 Files, AgentCore CLI** — Ang isang pinakamadaming-content na AWS post sa April: pinalalim na Anthropic collab (Trainium / Graviton silicon level), Meta Graviton-at-scale deployment, Claude Cowork sa Bedrock, AgentCore managed harness + CLI + Skills, plus Lambda Files (in-Lambda S3 access) at SES inbound improvements.

citations.label: AWS Blog - AWS Weekly Roundup: Anthropic & Meta partnership, AWS Lambda S3 Files, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore CLI, and more

bullets.body: **Claude Cowork sa Amazon Bedrock — enterprise team collaboration na may AWS-resident data** — Ang Cowork (collaborative-AI surface ng Anthropic) ay nadeploy na sa loob ng mga existing Bedrock environments nang hindi umaalis sa AWS data residency.

citations.label: AWS ML Blog - Running Claude Cowork in Amazon Bedrock

bullets.body: **Microsoft VibeVoice — open-source frontier voice AI (MIT licensed; nasa Transformers simula Mar 6, fresh practitioner attention noong Apr 27)** — Whisper-style STT na may built-in speaker diarization, 50+ languages, long-form (60-minute pass) transcription na gumagawa ng structured Who/When/What output.

citations.label: GitHub - microsoft/VibeVoice: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI

bullets.body: **Simon Willison Apr 28: Introducing `talkie-1930-13b-base` — 13B vintage language model mula kina Nick Levine, David Duvenaud, Alec Radford, trained sa 260B tokens ng pre-1931 historical text** — Una-sa-uri na release; iniiwasan ng pre-1931 corpus ang contemporary contamination.

citations.label: Simon Willison - Introducing talkie: a 13B vintage language model from 1930

bullets.body: **vLLM v0.20 path: patuloy ang Transformers v5 compatibility-fix wave; `Update to transformers v5` (PR #30566) ang primary integration vehicle** — Bumababa ang `huggingface-hub>=5` updates; `transformers>=5` model-loader compatibility fixes sa multiple architectures; `protobuf` patch para sa CVE-2026-0994; inalis ang deprecations (BitBlas quant, Marlin 24, `reasoning_content`, deprecated pooling items, `VLLM_ALL2ALL_BACKEND` env). Patuloy ang speculative-decoding maturity + MoE routing para sa Gemma 4 / DeepSeek-V3-style models.

citations.label: GitHub - vllm-project/vllm: Update to transformers v5 (#30566)

bullets.body: **Transformers v5 mismo (Hugging Face Apr 2026): "Simple model definitions powering the AI ecosystem"** — Ang canonical Hugging Face write-up na nag-frame ng v5 break + sa mga inference-server consumers nito (vLLM / SGLang / TGI).

citations.label: Hugging Face Blog - Transformers v5: Simple model definitions powering the AI ecosystem

bullets.body: **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — patch hindi pa rin upstream hanggang Apr 28; lumalawak ang copy-paste class sa vLLM (CVE-2025-61620) / LMDeploy / adjacent servers** — Sarado na ang coordinated disclosure window nang walang `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` mitigation; naipapadala ang v0.5.10 na exploitable. PoC `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE` patuloy na umiikot; active ang CERT/CC VU#915947.

citations.label: Feedly - CVE-2026-5760 / 9.8 / exploit + patch (no upstream fix)

bullets.body: **AgentCore Managed Harness (4-region preview), CLI (14-region GA), Skills sa Kiro Power — Apr 27 + filesystem-persistence preview** — Define-an-agent (model + system prompt + tools), per-session microVM, mid-session model swap, filesystem persistence para sa resumable sessions; tumatakbo ang CLI sa CDK ngayon, susunod ang Terraform.

citations.label: The NAS Guy - AWS Weekly Roundup Apr 27 2026 (mirror)

bullets.body: **DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash patuloy ang traction Apr 26-28 — live ang Hugging Face V4-Pro page; Pro = 1.6T MoE / 49B active; Flash = 284B / 13B active; 1M context** — Binababa ng Hybrid Attention ang compute sa 27% (Pro) / 10% (Flash) ng V3.2 sa 1M-context. Pro priced sa $1.74 / $3.48 kada M tokens. Apr 24 official preview status nananatili hanggang Apr 28.

citations.label: Felloai - DeepSeek V4 Released: Everything You Need to Know (April 2026)

sections.category: Local LLM > Qwen / Tencent / Other Chinese LLMs

bullets.body: **Qwen3.6-Max-Preview (Apr 20, traction Apr 26-28) — pinakamagaling na LM ng Alibaba; top scores sa SWE-bench Pro / SkillsBench / SciCode; 260K-token context; preserve_thinking mode para sa agentic workflows** — Anchor ng Qwen3.6 family kasama ng Qwen3.6-27B (Apr 21, dense 27B / 262K context) at Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (Apr 16, Apache 2.0). Qwen3.6-Plus din nasa market para sa enterprise agentic deployment.

citations.label: Qwen.ai - Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Smarter, Sharper, Still Evolving

bullets.body: **PrismML 1-bit Bonsai-8B nananatili Apr 26-28 — iPhone 17 Pro Max 44 tok/s, M4 Pro Mac 131 tok/s, RTX 4090 368 tok/s; 1.15 GB total file** — Native 1-bit training (hindi PTQ); 14x size reduction; 4-5x energy-per-word reduction; CUDA / Metal / Android / CPU. Cross-stack on-device deployment baseline.

citations.label: PrismML - Bonsai 8B repo / model card

bullets.body: **Unsloth v0.1.37-beta (Apr 23) — buong Studio UI/UX overhaul, Preserve Thinking toggle para sa Qwen3.6, gpt-oss thinking toggle, Linux CUDA gumagamit ng pinakabagong llama.cpp prebuilt, naka-enable ang Kimi-K2.6, experimental API support** — Nakakuha ang Studio ng collapsible sidebar, chat deletion + past-conversation search, expanded Settings page (hindi na kailangang ipasok ang HF tokens nang dalawang beses). Cumulative sa v0.1.36-beta (Apr 8): mga fix ng Gemma 4 training bugs; **Gemma-4-E2B local-train sa 8 GB VRAM, ~1.5x mas mabilis, ~60% mas konting VRAM kaysa FA2**. Nagdagdag noong Apr 11 ng MiniMax-M2.7 + na-update ang Gemma 4 GGUFs sa opisyal na chat template ng Google. Naroon sa tabi ng Bonsai-8B bilang on-device fine-tuning baseline.

citations.label: GitHub - unslothai/unsloth releases

bullets.body: **Unsloth Updates / changelog — opisyal na tracker para sa Apr 8 / 11 / 23 cadence** — Reference page para sa consumer-GPU fine-tuning + Studio rollout na siyang pinakamaingay na local-trainer narrative noong Abril.

citations.label: Unsloth Documentation - Updates / Changelog

bullets.body: **Patuloy ang llama.cpp build cadence Apr 27-28 — macOS ARM64/x64, Android, OpenEuler, CUDA binaries Apr 27; llama-cpp-python 0.3.21 same-day** — Hawak ang sub-day build train; minimalist web-UI para sa local model operations na inanunsyo bilang alternative sa server-based interaction.

citations.label: PyPI - llama-cpp-python (Apr 27, 2026 release 0.3.21)

bullets.body: **Ollama v0.21.3-rc0 (Apr 24) — `max` think-parameter + improved OpenAI response mapping para sa reasoning effort** — Nakapatong sa v0.21.2 (Apr 23) Kimi K2.6 + Gemma 4 MLX path. Native OpenClaw web-search plugin nananatiling nakabundle.

citations.label: Release Alert - ollama/ollama Releases tracker

bullets.body: **Foundry Local — GA carry-forward (Apr 9 launch); MAI-Transcribe-1 + GPT-4.1 model graders + RFT Global Training (o4-mini) patuloy Apr 26-28** — Cross-platform local AI sa Windows / macOS / Android / on-prem Azure Local. Ang MLX support ay nananatiling open issue (`microsoft/Foundry-Local#329`).

sections.category: AI Security > Solutions: Zero-Trust Access Control for Agentic AI

bullets.body: **Okta for AI Agents — GA Apr 30 (countdown: 2 araw mula Apr 28)** — Agent Discovery & Governance, Agent Gateway bilang central MCP control plane (virtual MCP server na nag-aaggregate sa Okta MCP registry), credential vaulting + auto-rotation, runtime enforcement via universal logout. Nananatili ang prior coverage hanggang sa Apr 30 GA event.

citations.label: Cloud Security Alliance - ATF: Zero Trust for AI Agents

bullets.body: **Microsoft "Zero Trust for AI" (RSAC 2026 carry-forward) — bagong AI pillar sa Zero Trust Workshop, updated Data + Networking pillars sa Zero Trust Assessment, Zero Trust reference architecture para sa AI** — Pinapalakas ng cross-vendor consensus mula RSAC 2026 (ang "action control" ng Cisco, CrowdStrike, Splunk) ang zero-trust-for-agents bilang assumed baseline hanggang Apr 28.

citations.label: Cisco - Zero trust for the agentic AI workforce (carry-forward into Apr 28)

sections.category: AI Security > Solutions: Monitor and Manage AI Agent Behavior

bullets.body: **Google + Forcepoint indirect-prompt-injection in-the-wild reports (Apr 24-27) — 10 fresh IPI payloads, kabilang ang fully-specified PayPal transaction na nagta-target sa payment-capable agents at Stripe-donation routing via meta-tag namespace injection** — Indirect injection ay >80% na ngayon ng enterprise prompt-injection volume; nakakaapekto sa anumang agent na nagba-browse + nagsi-summarize, nagi-index para sa RAG, nagpro-process ng metadata/HTML comments, o nagmo-moderate ng ad content.

citations.label: Airia - AI Security in 2026: Prompt Injection, the Lethal Trifecta, and How to Defend

bullets.body: **Publicly inamin ng OpenAI na permanente ang prompt-injection class — VentureBeat Apr 26-27 coverage** — Naiwan ang mga defenders; lumipat ang threat-class mula "patchable" patungong "design-constraint." Nag-frame ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotion thesis.

citations.label: VentureBeat - OpenAI admits prompt injection is here to stay as enterprises lag on defenses

bullets.body: **Tinamaan ng NVIDIA ang fresh 52-week high noong Apr 27 (+4%); inilalathala ng Money Morning ang signal ng move papuntang Mag 7 prints + May 20 NVDA print** — Malakas na demand sa AI capex tape; Wall Street consensus "Strong Buy"; price target $266.24.

citations.label: Money Morning - NVIDIA Just Hit a New 52-Week High (April 28, 2026)

bullets.body: **AMD ATH $352.99 Apr 24; +65% MTD papuntang May 5 print; consensus $9.84B revenue / +33% YoY EPS** — Nagsosolid ang AI Chip Challenger framing hanggang Apr 28; 37 Buy/Strong Buy / 12 Hold / 0 Sell. Carry-forward sa May 5.

**Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: "muling itinatatag ng CPU ang sarili nito bilang indispensable foundation ng AI era" (investor call carry-forward Apr 27)** — Pumapasok ang CPUs sa AI conversation bilang inference + day-to-day workload primitive katabi ng GPUs.

**Nakumpirma ang Cerebras IPO mid-May window, $22B-$25B target — $20B+ / 750MW OpenAI deal hanggang 2028; underwriters Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS** — 2025 revenue $510M (+76% YoY), $87.9M net income; $24.6B remaining performance obligations (15% i-recognize sa 2026/2027). 24% ng 2025 revenue mula G42 / 62% mula MBZUAI.

citations.label: SEC - Cerebras S-1 (April 2026)

citations.label: Motley Fool - With Intel, AMD, Nvidia, and More Rising Sharply Last Week, Have Chip Stocks Become Overvalued?

bullets.body: **Pinatay ang OpenAI–Microsoft AGI clause noong Apr 27 — non-exclusive license hanggang 2032, capped ang revenue share sa 2030, malinis na ang OpenAI sa AWS ($38B nakapirma na Nov 2025, $50B headroom)** — Pinakaimportanteng corporate-structure move ng AI era hanggang sa kasalukuyan; nire-reset ang cap-table-coupling baseline para sa Mag 7 commentary.

**Mag 7 super-week Apr 28-30 — MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META Apr 29 after close, AAPL Apr 30 after close; ~$700B 2026 capex aggregated; Q1 expected +20.3% earnings sa +22% revenue** — Lahat ng apat na Wednesday names ay tumaas ng >10% MoM papasok sa prints; AAPL +6%. Ang AI-capex guidance ang isang pinakapinapanood na linya para sa mas malawak na AI supply chain.
